payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam from Goldman, and mem_new matches that current entity context; superseded mem_old is not eligible for current recall.

mem_old was excluded from recall because it is marked as superseded.
